title: 8x10 Picture Frame, Solid Oak Wood 8x10 inch Natural Wood Photo Frame for Home & Wall Decor, 8x10 Picture Frame with Mount for 5x7 Inch with Tempered Real Glass, Tabletop & Wall Mounting Display
features: Natural Solid Oak Wood Frame - Display your special monments in style with this 8x10 frame crafted from 100% natural solid oak wood. With a versatile size that display 8x10 pictures or 5x7 pictures with a mat. The natural wood grains on this real oak wood picture frame lends it an authentic look. Durable, elegant and timeless make the frame perfect for preserving your memories.

High-Definition Tempered Glass - This oak wood picture frame comes with sturdy 2.0mm tempered glass front, which is clear and lightweight, giving your photo in a good view condition and protecting them from scratches ,fingerprints, dirt, water. What's more, our glass with edge polished that protect you from scratching by sharp glass edges.

Vertical & Horizontal Wall Hanging - With easy-to-open turn buttons and thick cardboard backing, inserting and displaying your pictures is a breeze. Can be hung horizontally or vertically to fit in the space available, or can stand independently on any desk. Hanging hardware is included so you can display your frame as soon as it arrives!

Stylish & Versatile Home Decor– These 8"x10" photo frames add a touch of elegance to any room, making them ideal for living rooms, bedrooms, offices, and more. Our wall picture frames can be used not only for pictures, but is also perfect for displaying drawings, diplomas, artworks, art prints artwork, certificates, posters, and other keepsakes! Their sleek and timeless design blends seamlessly with any decor, allowing you to relive your cherished memories in style.

Perfect Gift- Our natural oak wood picture frame ideal an thoughtful and meanful gift for your loved ones for any occasion, including birthdays, housewarmings, weddings, graduations, Christmas, anniversaries,or any special event. It's an excellent way to add color and personality to any space and make memories last a lifetime.
